title: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
summary: Energy grids and train services are vulnerable to extreme heat, which disrupts critical infrastructure that depends on cooling systems. This matters as climate risks increasingly threaten vital services modern economies depend on.
content: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.

zh.title: 为什么关键技术容易受热的影响?
zh.summary: 能源电网和铁路服务容易受到极端高温的影响，这会破坏依赖冷却系统的关键基础设施。随着气候风险日益威胁现代经济所依赖的重要服务，这一点变得越来越重要。

title: Europe’s defense boom faces a new test: Can it actually deliver weapons?
summary: Europe's increased defense spending is being tested by investor concerns about manufacturers' ability to convert budgets into actual weapons production and manage backlogs. The outcome will determine whether Europe can realize its defense modernization ambitions.
content: Europe’s defense boom faces a test as investors weigh whether budgets and backlogs can become weapons, factories and returns.

zh.title: 欧洲国防支出增加面临新考验：它真的能交付武器吗?
zh.summary: 欧洲国防支出增加正受到投资者的考验，他们担心制造商是否有能力将预算转化为实际的武器生产并管理积压。结果将决定欧洲是否能够实现其国防现代化的雄心。

title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping commemorated the Communist Party of China's 105th anniversary, emphasizing the party's expanding global influence and international reach. The speech underscores Beijing's strategic focus on projecting power worldwide.
content: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.

zh.title: 习近平在中共105周年纪念讲话中宣传中共的全球影响力
zh.summary: 中国领导人习近平纪念了中国共产党成立105周年，强调了该党日益扩大的全球影响力和国际地位。这次讲话强调了北京战略性地关注在全球范围内投射力量。

title: Romesh Ranganathan 'gutted' over bakery closure
summary: Coughlans Bakery entered voluntary liquidation due to rising national insurance and business rates costs in the UK. The closure illustrates mounting pressures small businesses face from regulatory expenses.
content: Coughlans Bakery says it has gone into voluntary liquidation over hikes in national insurance and business rates.

zh.title: Romesh Ranganathan为面包店关闭感到"沮丧"
zh.summary: Coughlans面包店因英国国民保险和商业税费上升而进入自愿清算。此次关闭反映了小企业面临的监管成本压力不断增加。

title: LNG market disruption may continue for months as a top producer withholds some Italian shipments
summary: QatarEnergy extended its force majeure declaration, withholding four LNG cargoes until September due to war-related supply disruptions. The prolonged shortage continues straining global LNG markets and energy costs.
content: QatarEnergy extended its force majeure, withholding four additional LNG cargoes until September, as damage from the war prolongs supply constraints.

zh.title: 一家主要生产商扣留部分意大利运货，液化天然气市场中断可能持续数月
zh.summary: 卡塔尔能源公司延长了不可抗力声明，因战争相关供应中断，扣留四批液化天然气货物至九月。持续的短缺继续对全球液化天然气市场和能源成本造成压力。

title: North Sea oil and renewables: The UK’s next PM faces a defining energy policy decision
summary: The incoming UK Prime Minister faces a defining decision on North Sea oil drilling amid renewed energy security concerns. The choice will shape the country's energy policy balance between fossil fuels and renewables.
content: Andy Burnham could face an early test over North Sea oil drilling as energy shocks revive the UK energy security debate.

zh.title: 北海石油与可再生能源：英国下任首相面临关键能源政策抉择
zh.summary: 英国新任首相在能源安全日益受关注的背景下，面临关于北海石油钻探的关键决策。这一选择将决定该国在化石燃料和可再生能源之间的能源政策平衡。

title: KKR to control South Korea's $1.3 billion renewables platform with SK as AI power demand rises
summary: KKR is gaining control of South Korea's $1.3 billion renewables platform as AI data centers drive surging power demand. The deal reflects South Korea's strategic pivot toward semiconductors and AI infrastructure.
content: The announcement came after South Korea announced on Monday three massive investment projects, spanning semiconductors, physical AI and AI data centers.

zh.title: KKR将控制韩国价值13亿美元的可再生能源平台，因AI电力需求上升
zh.summary: KKR正在获得对韩国价值13亿美元的可再生能源平台的控制权，因为人工智能数据中心推动电力需求激增。该交易反映了韩国向半导体和人工智能基础设施的战略转向。

title: Japan spent $74 billion propping up the yen. Investors say the real battle is with the Fed
summary: Japan's $74 billion yen intervention had limited impact as wide interest rate differentials with the U.S. continue supporting dollar strength. Analysts argue Fed policy, not intervention alone, will determine currency outcomes.
content: Yen intervention alone is unlikely to reverse losses while wide U.S.-Japan rate differentials keep supporting the dollar, said analysts.

zh.title: 日本花费740亿美元支撑日元。投资者表示真正的战斗是与美联储的较量
zh.summary: 日本740亿美元的日元干预影响有限，因为与美国之间的利率差异继续支撑美元强势。分析师认为美联储政策而非干预本身将决定汇率结果。

title: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
summary: Companies that laid off workers citing AI automation are now rehiring, discovering that artificial intelligence cannot fully replace human workers. The trend reveals early AI limitations and persistent business demand for talent.
content: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses

zh.title: 引用AI理由裁员的雇主已经开始后悔
zh.summary: 因人工智能自动化理由裁员的公司现在正在重新招聘，发现人工智能无法完全取代人类员工。这一趋势揭示了早期人工智能的局限性和持续存在的商业人才需求。

title: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
summary: The U.S. government lifted its export ban on Anthropic's advanced AI models Fable and Mythos, which were suspended in June over hacking concerns. The decision allows Anthropic to resume international distribution of these tools.
content: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.

zh.title: Anthropic称美国解除对其先进AI工具的出口禁令
zh.summary: 美国政府解除了对Anthropic先进AI模型Fable和Mythos的出口禁令，这两个模型因6月份的黑客问题而被暂停。该决定允许Anthropic恢复这些工具的国际分发。

title: U.S. military deploys over 900 personnel to Venezuela for earthquake response
summary: The U.S. deployed over 900 military personnel to Venezuela for earthquake relief operations including search-and-rescue and humanitarian logistics. The rapid response demonstrates coordinated international disaster relief.
content: U.S. ‌forces joined search-and-rescue operations, restored airport operations and mobilized air and naval assets to speed humanitarian aid after the earthquakes.

zh.title: 美国军方部署900多名人员前往委内瑞拉参与地震救援
zh.summary: 美国向委内瑞拉部署了900多名军事人员进行地震救援行动，包括搜救和人道主义后勤。这种快速反应展示了协调一致的国际灾难救援。

title: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported
summary: Iran is exporting 40 million barrels of oil at a 20% premium following the end of the U.S. blockade and ceasefire. The surge in Strait of Hormuz crude shipments signals a major geopolitical shift in Middle East energy markets.
content: The ceasefire prompted a surge in crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic had largely ground to a halt during the conflict.

zh.title: 伊朗称随着美国封锁的结束，石油以20%溢价出售，出口4000万桶
zh.summary: 伊朗在美国封锁和停火结束后，以20%的溢价出口4000万桶石油。霍尔木兹海峡原油出货量的激增预示着中东能源市场出现了重大地缘政治转变。

title: CNBC Daily Open: AI demand fuels investors' portfolios while oil posts biggest monthly decline
summary: AI-driven demand continues dominating investor portfolios in the technology sector while oil prices posted their biggest monthly decline. AWS is expanding AI competition with specialized units to challenge OpenAI and Anthropic.
content: The tech space continues to be fueled by rising artificial intelligence demand, with investors piling their portfolios in the technology, while Amazon Web Services dabbles with Forward Deployed Engineering units to better compete with  OpenAI and Anthropic.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：AI需求推动投资者投资组合增长，油价创月度最大跌幅
zh.summary: AI驱动的需求继续在科技板块主导投资者投资组合，而油价创下月度最大跌幅。AWS正在通过专业化部门扩展AI竞争，以挑战OpenAI和Anthropic。

title: This threat to the chip rally has surged to its highest level since 2015
summary: Market volatility has surged to its highest level since 2015, threatening recent semiconductor stock gains including AMD and Micron. The spike raises concerns about sustainability of the ongoing chip rally.
content: Volatility threatens top gainers including AMD and Micron.

zh.title: 对芯片反弹的威胁已升至2015年以来的最高水平
zh.summary: 市场波动性已升至2015年以来的最高水平，威胁到最近的半导体股票涨幅，包括AMD和美光。这种飙升引发了对正在进行的芯片反弹可持续性的担忧。

title: Bitcoin ETFs were supposed to make selloffs less painful. That theory is being put to the test.
summary: Bitcoin ETFs have not prevented painful crypto selloffs despite expectations that institutional adoption would stabilize prices. A crypto-friendly administration has not eliminated the cyclical volatility Bitcoin has historically experienced.
content: Crypto investors had hoped that increased institutional adoption and a crypto-friendly administration could help the largest cryptocurrency avoid the painful cycles it once experienced.

zh.title: 比特币ETF本应减轻抛售痛苦。这个理论正在被检验。
zh.summary: 尽管市场期望机构采用会稳定价格，但比特币ETF未能防止痛苦的加密货币抛售。加密货币友好的政府并未消除比特币历来经历的周期性波动。

title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
summary: Trump earned over $1 billion from cryptocurrency investments in his first year back in office, more than doubling his previous reported annual income of $600 million. This significant increase reflects both expanded crypto holdings and asset appreciation. The disclosure highlights the intersection of political leadership and substantial personal financial interests in emerging technology.
content: It compares with more than $600m in total income that Trump reported in his last financial disclosure.

zh.title: 特朗普在重返政界第一年从加密货币中赚得超过10亿美元
zh.summary: 特朗普在重返政界的第一年从加密货币投资中赚得超过10亿美元，远超其之前报告的年收入600万美元。这一显著增长反映了加密货币持有量的扩大和资产升值。该披露突显了政治领导力与新兴技术领域巨大个人财务利益的交集。

title: Why Asia still struggles to create its own mega-IPOs like SpaceX
summary: Despite abundant entrepreneurs, engineers, and massive domestic markets, Asia has failed to produce mega-IPOs comparable to U.S. listings like SpaceX. The region's lag in blockbuster public market debuts reveals structural or regulatory barriers preventing comparable scale. Understanding this gap is crucial for Asian economies seeking to compete in global capital markets.
content: Asia has no shortage of entrepreneurs, engineers or giant domestic markets. Yet when it comes to producing the kind of blockbuster listings seen in the U.S., the region continues to lag.

zh.title: 为什么亚洲仍难以创造像SpaceX这样的大型首次公开募股
zh.summary: 尽管亚洲拥有众多企业家、工程师和庞大的国内市场，但该地区未能产生与美国上市公司（如SpaceX）相当的大型首次公开募股。该地区在轰动性公开市场首次亮相中的落后表明存在结构性或监管障碍，阻止了类似规模。理解这一差距对于寻求在全球资本市场竞争的亚洲经济体至关重要。

title: Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
summary: The Trump administration has removed export controls on Anthropic's AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5, potentially expanding their global availability. This regulatory change reflects shifting U.S. policy on artificial intelligence exports and competitive positioning. The decision could accelerate international adoption of these advanced AI systems.
content: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models

zh.title: Anthropic称特朗普政府已解除对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制
zh.summary: 特朗普政府已取消对Anthropic公司AI模型Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制，可能扩大其全球可用性。这一监管变化反映了美国在人工智能出口和竞争定位政策上的转变。该决定可能加速这些先进AI系统的国际采纳。

title: Yen slides to new 40-year low while Dow futures ease after strongest first half in five years: Live updates
summary: The Japanese yen has reached its lowest level in 40 years while U.S. stock markets posted their strongest first-half performance in five years, with the Dow up 8.9%. These currency and equity movements reflect broader shifts in global economic conditions and investor sentiment. The divergence highlights different economic pressures facing Japan versus the U.S.
content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 8.9% in the first half of 2026.

zh.title: 日元跌至40年低点，道指在创五年最强上半年表现后小幅回调：实时更新
zh.summary: 日元已跌至40年来的最低水平，而美国股市创造了五年来最强劲的上半年表现，道指上涨8.9%。这些货币和股市波动反映了全球经济条件和投资者情绪的更广泛变化。这种分化突显了日本和美国面临的不同经济压力。

title: Nike earnings crushed Wall Street’s estimates — but here’s the catch
summary: Nike's earnings and gross margins exceeded Wall Street expectations, but gains were primarily driven by a tariff refund rather than operational improvements. The underlying business performance appears weaker than headline results suggest, raising sustainability questions. This distinction is important for investors evaluating the company's fundamental health.
content: Nike’s profit and gross margins were buoyed by a tariff refund.

zh.title: 耐克收益远超华尔街预期——但这里有个问题
zh.summary: 耐克的收益和毛利率超过了华尔街的预期，但增长主要由关税退款驱动，而非运营改善。潜在的业务表现看起来比头条数字所示的要弱，引发了可持续性问题。这一区别对投资者评估公司的基本健康状况很重要。
